title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Juicy Chemistry

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Juicy Chemistry
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Juicy Chemistry! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Juicy Chemistry:
Juicy Chemistry is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juicy Chemistry!
